title: In Belfast, riots and mayhem follow alleged stabbing by Sudanese asylum seeker
summary_full: The torching of neighborhoods across Belfast, the capital of Northern Ireland, marked the latest anti-immigration violence to convulse the United Kingdom.
summary_public: The torching of neighborhoods across Belfast, the capital of Northern Ireland, marked the latest anti-immigration violence to convulse the United Kingdom.
